repo.description: Parse, manipulate and render CommonMark in Scala Native

terms.context_snippet: cmark-scala provides [Scala Native](http://www.scala-native.org/) bindings for [cmark](https://github.com/commonmark/cmark). cmark allows to parse, manipulate and render CommonMark documents.
cmark-scala provides [Scala Native](http://www.scala-native.org/) bindings for [cmark](https://github.com/commonmark/cmark). cmark allows to parse, manipulate and render CommonMark documents.
